title: City University of Seattle - Canada.ca
content:
## City University of Seattle
You are eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Bachelor of Arts in Management (New students are no longer being accepted into this program, and consent ends to offer the program on June 19, 2026. Current students who complete the program before this date should be considered eligible for PGWP.)
- Master of Counselling
- Master of Education in School Counselling
- Master of Education Leadership in Education - Program is no longer offered at this DLI. Students who completed this program prior to September 19th, 2023 should be considered eligible for PGWP.
You are not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
